task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home page is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing the user logged in as 'root').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the study or site management section for the correct study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Build Study' or 'Manage Study' page for 'DM-TRIAL-2024' (Phase II Diabetes Trial), or specifically shows the site details for 'Boston Medical Center'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the event definitions specifically for the 'Boston Medical Center' site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration screen showing the study events specifically for the 'Boston Medical Center' site, with the 'Baseline Assessment' event visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the default CRF version for the site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation screen or configuration page showing the 'Physical Exam' CRF assigned to the 'Baseline Assessment' event at the 'Boston Medical Center' site, with its default version explicitly set to 'v2.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the parent study level CRF version remains unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the event definitions for the parent study ('Phase II Diabetes Trial' / 'DM-TRIAL-2024') where the 'Physical Exam' CRF for the 'Baseline Assessment' event still shows 'v1.0' as its default version.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the web browser interface (clicking links, selecting dropdowns). There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL queries (psql) or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual OpenClinica application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a valid local OpenClinica URL (e.g., localhost:8080/OpenClinica), not a local HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to manually edit the DOM text to say 'v2.0' or 'v1.0'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Parent study identifier is 'DM-TRIAL-2024'. Site name is 'Boston Medical Center'. Event name is 'Baseline Assessment'. CRF name is 'Physical Exam'. The target site version for the CRF must be updated to 'v2.0'. The target parent version for the CRF must remain 'v1.0'.
